chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S– 305 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.11/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.12/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.13/2025 (C/A) 19.01.2026 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate along with Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Dismissed having become infructuous. 2. Granted subject to all just exception. 3. Pursuant to order dated 13.11.2025, DIG Police Sukkur has submitted a compliance report, which shows that an inquiry was conducted into the allegation of the Petitioners against the police officers; however, such allegation was found to be without merits. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he is not aware of such report. He may obtain copy from the office. In view of the compliance report, no case for contempt of Court is made out; therefore, the contempt application is dismissed. Judge ARBROHI
